title: alnus incana var. occidentalis
intro: Alnus incana var. occidentalis, also known as the western green alder, is a deciduous tree native to North America. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its bark, which has been traditionally used to treat a variety of ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The plant is rich in antioxidants and has anti-inflammatory properties, which contribute to its health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of Alnus incana var. occidentalis include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to make remedies for various health conditions.
